base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of nes_menu_password_entry — a ui (menu_screen) from 1986 metroid. NES password-entry menu — 24-char code input. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: NES password-entry menu — 24-char code input; distinct layout from FDS
